titleStmt.title: SII 40.244: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 244. (A.R. No. B. 289 of 1933.) Mādala, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up in the compound of the Sakalēśvarasvāmi temple.

Records the construction of a temple and a maṇḍapa to the god Sakalēśvaradēva at Māvundala by the king, and also grant of lands in Koṇḍapaḍumaṟa. Fifty five sheep were gifted by the king and his two younger brothers Paṇḍe-Nāyaka and Sāde-Nāyaka for burning perpetual lamps in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁta vī
ralakṣmīkāṁta durjjayakulācala mrigēṁdra satya
hariścaṁdra mahēśvara śrīpāda paṁkajarajā
ttaṁ savalaraṭlakulāvataṁsa kāṁcīpura rakṣapā
laka bīrudaṁkaśūdraka gaṁḍaragaṁḍa gaṁḍamārttaṁ
ḍa nāmādi samasta praśasti sahitaṁ . śrīma
nmaṁḍanāyakuṁḍu goṁḍapaḍumaṭilōṁdana
vṛttiyaina mā maṁḍalamaṁdu śakavarṣamulu
1047 gu śrāhini sakalēśvaradēvarakati
priti guḍiyunu maṁḍapaṁbunuṁ gaṭṭi
ṁceyā dēvaraku bhōgārtthaṁbugāṁdana ka
ṭṭiṁcina yēḍu sēṟuvulalōnanūri muṁda
ṭipeṁjeṟuvupiṟuṁdi muṁdaṭi vīri polamēlla
nicci velipolamu nūṟu puṭla paṭṭu dūrppudikku
naniccinanaṁdu dēvara dānaparigrahamunaku niccina
lekkameṁdaka proṭamupperisāni kha 3 kannedēva kha 3 bhūmināga kha 3
dāmakarē kā kha 3 potamuttāka kha 3 prātanāgā kha 30
naṭṭavulakomma kha 3 prōlekāmmaka kha 3 kōsaneyarugā
kha 3 mrānakamēḍā kha 3 kommaka malla kha 3 kītaka berā
kha 3 māḷla pācaka kha 3 khairasūra kha 3 silā Eṟṟaka kha 3
naṭṭamalakamma kha 6 maddeliya kāṟiddaṟakunu kha 6
pāḍeḍuvāraleddaṟaku kha 6 goḍamavāni kha 2 śaṁ
ku dhāravāni kha 3 pūjari kha 3 paricāraku kha 3
dēvarapeddatoṁṭa kaṟṟe kha 2 pinnatoṁṭa kāme kha 2 nīri
nēla maṟuturu 1 mēlunāyaku kha 3 viṣṇudēvara
pūjāri kha 3 pōtācāri kha 8 nīrimattu 4 kanmari paḍlōju kha 3
Ī mahādēvaramāni pōtabaḍāmarttu 1 kha 3 prolebhimmakha 3 vaḍḍalanū rēkha 3
śrīmanmaṁḍenāyakuṁḍu sakalēśvara mahā
dēvarakakhaṁḍavatti dīpaṁbunakiccina goṟiyalu
55 vīniṁjēkoni kētabōyu koḍuku getedana pu
trānu pautrikamācaṁdrārkkamu dēvara dīpaṁbunaku
nityamāneṁḍu nēyivoyaṁgalavāṁḍu . vīritammu
ṁḍu paṁḍenāyakuṁḍu mahādēvarakakhaṁḍava
tti dīpaṁbunakiccina goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁjēkoni
lā(Āṁ)ḍūri pōtabōyuṁḍu danaputrānupautrikamu
nityamāneṁḍu nēyi dēvara dīpaṁbunakācaṁdrarkka
muṁ boyaṁgalavāṁḍu . vīrala tammuṁḍu sādē
nāyakuṁḍu mahādēvarakakhaṁḍavatti dīpaṁbu
nakiccina goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁjēkoni mālena boyu
kēta dana putrānupautrakamācaṁdrārkkamu dēvaradīpa
ṁbunaku nityamāneṁḍu nēyi bōyaṁgalavāṁḍu .
Digital edition of SII 40.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
